name: Aeon's End
description: Aeon's End is Kevin Riley's cooperative deck-builder against an apocalyptic Nemesis — players are mages defending the last refuge of humanity, drawing from never-shuffled decks, prepping spells in personal breaches, and wearing down nightmarish villains with branching mechanics. The variable turn order keeps every battle tense to the last card. Dark, mechanical, and deeply replayable.
